--- revoke_on_all_views_in_schema.sql
REVOKE SELECT ON ALL VIEWS IN SCHEMA db.sch FROM ROLE r

--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.SelectPrivilegeOnAllViewsInSchema{
    Select:  7,
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 37,
            NameEnd: 39,
            Name:    "db",
          },
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 40,
            NameEnd: 43,
            Name:    "sch",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 54,
      NameEnd: 55,
      Name:    "r",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE SELECT ON ALL VIEWS IN SCHEMA db.sch FROM ROLE r
